headline_seed: L.A. Mayor Bass will face either Spencer Pratt or Nithya Raman in Nov. 3 runoff - Los Angeles Times
draft_text:
L.A. Mayor Bass advances to the Nov. 3 runoff, per the Associated Press. With 63% counted: Bass 35%, Pratt 30%, Raman 23%. The second slot is still unsettled.

And that's the mews.
